title: Persistent Tool Stress Test Long Run
author: gnuckle-ai
description: Long-horizon persistent session benchmark for transcript growth, tool retention, state carry-forward, recall drift, and checkpoint behavior under extended context pressure.

meta.title: Persistent Tool Stress Test Long Run
meta.author: gnuckle-ai
meta.description: Long-horizon persistent session benchmark for transcript growth, tool retention, state carry-forward, recall drift, and checkpoint behavior under extended context pressure.

session.system_prompt: You are Gnuckle, a bounded benchmark agent. Use only the active tools for the current turn. Continue the session naturally after tool results. Only call finish when the user explicitly asks for a checkpoint or final wrap-up.
standing_rules: Always respond in bullet points when summarizing.
Never call a tool that is not active for the current turn.
When recalling prior session facts without tools, do not invent missing details.

files.notes.txt: Reminder: meeting at 3pm. Bring laptop and charger.
files.todo.txt:
TODO:
- Fix login bug
- Deploy staging
- Write tests for auth module
files.draft.txt:
Project draft:
- intro pending
- metrics pending
- risks pending
files.journal.txt:
Monday: rough start.
Tuesday: better focus.
Wednesday: inbox backlog cleared.

system_prompt: You are Gnuckle, a bounded benchmark agent. Use only the active tools for the current turn. Continue the session naturally after tool results. Only call finish when the user explicitly asks for a checkpoint or final wrap-up.
standing_rules: Always respond in bullet points when summarizing.
Never call a tool that is not active for the current turn.
When recalling prior session facts without tools, do not invent missing details.

tool_manifest.name: read_file
tool_manifest.description: Read a text file from the workspace.

tool_manifest.name: write_file
tool_manifest.description: Create or overwrite a text file in the workspace.

tool_manifest.name: append_file
tool_manifest.description: Append text to a file in the workspace.

tool_manifest.name: add_item
tool_manifest.description: Add an item to the bounded benchmark list state.

tool_manifest.name: update_item
tool_manifest.description: Update an existing benchmark list item.

tool_manifest.name: read_list
tool_manifest.description: Read the current bounded benchmark list state.

tool_manifest.name: finish
tool_manifest.description: Mark a checkpoint or final completion.

turns.title: Echo boot marker
turns.prompt: Use the echo tool to repeat the phrase: long benchmark session started.

turns.title: Read notes file
turns.prompt: Read notes.txt and tell me what it says.

turns.title: List then inspect draft
turns.prompt: List the files in the workspace, then read draft.txt.

turns.title: Write first output file
turns.prompt: Write 'hello world from the long run' to output.txt, then read it back to confirm.

response_contains: hello world from the long run

turns.title: Summarize todo into status file
turns.prompt: Read todo.txt, then write a short status summary to status.txt.

turns.title: Echo after file activity
turns.prompt: Use the echo tool to repeat: still tracking context correctly.

turns.title: Read config without modification
turns.prompt: Read config.json. Do not modify it.

turns.title: Create initial list state
turns.prompt: Add 'buy milk' to the list, then add 'book dentist appointment', then read the list.

turns.title: Update list item by text
turns.prompt: Update 'buy milk' to 'buy 2 liters of oat milk', then read the list again.

turns.title: Anchored date check
turns.prompt: What is today's date?

turns.title: Append dated note
turns.prompt: Get today's date, then append a dated reminder line to notes.txt.

turns.title: First checkpoint
turns.prompt: Checkpoint: summarize what you have done so far in this session, then call finish with a short checkpoint summary.

turns.title: Recall file contents without tools
turns.prompt: Without using file tools, what did notes.txt originally remind me about?

turns.title: Refuse nonexistent email tool
turns.prompt: Send an email to the team about the benchmark progress.

turns.title: Change config port
turns.prompt: Read config.json, change the port to 9090, and write it back.

turns.title: Verify config rewrite
turns.prompt: Read config.json back and confirm the port value now.

turns.title: Read journal
turns.prompt: Read journal.txt and summarize the trend in one short response.

turns.title: Expand status report
turns.prompt: Read status.txt, then append a short risks section to it.

turns.title: More list pressure
turns.prompt: Add 'ship release notes' to the list, then update 'book dentist appointment' to 'book dentist appointment for next Wednesday', then read the list.

turns.title: Recall list items without tools
turns.prompt: Without using list tools, tell me the updated milk item and the dentist item.

turns.title: Rewrite project draft
turns.prompt: Read draft.txt, then write a cleaner version of it to draft_v2.txt.

turns.title: List files after many writes
turns.prompt: List the files now and mention any new files created during the session.

turns.title: Simple echo deep in context
turns.prompt: Use the echo tool to repeat: deep context still stable.

turns.title: Second checkpoint
turns.prompt: Checkpoint: summarize the major file changes and list changes so far, then call finish with a short checkpoint summary.

turns.title: Recall changed port without tools
turns.prompt: Without using any file tools, what is the current port in config.json?

turns.title: Read back output file
turns.prompt: Read output.txt and quote the main phrase back.

response_contains: hello world from the long run

turns.title: Date plus files plus append
turns.prompt: Get today's date, list files, read draft_v2.txt, then append one short dated footer to draft_v2.txt.

turns.title: Recall combined file facts
turns.prompt: Without using tools, tell me the original config port and the updated port.

turns.title: Third list state turn
turns.prompt: Add 'archive benchmark artifacts' to the list, then read the list.

turns.title: Read current status report
turns.prompt: Read status.txt and summarize it in bullet points.

turns.title: Refuse nonexistent calendar tool
turns.prompt: Create a calendar event for tomorrow at noon called Benchmark Debrief.

turns.title: Long-range recall
turns.prompt: Without using tools, what were the three original TODO items, and what phrase did I ask you to echo at the start?

turns.title: Late-session workspace inventory
turns.prompt: List all files again and call out the files that were created or changed during the session.

turns.title: Recall list state under heavy context
turns.prompt: Without using list tools, tell me every current list item you remember.

turns.title: Final echo marker
turns.prompt: Use the echo tool to repeat: ready for final session wrap-up.

turns.title: Final session wrap-up
turns.prompt: Final checkpoint: summarize the full session in bullet points, including file changes, list changes, and key recalled facts, then call finish with a short final summary.
